findings.message: The trace does not produce a final answer to the multiple-choice question. It stops at an unresolved team-agnostic score pair instead of justifying one unique provided option.

The trace correctly notes that the provided text does not explicitly map score 52 versus 40 to Bristol Central versus East Catholic at the end of the third quarter. That missing score-to-team association blocks choosing between the leading-team variants.

Even if the score pair 52 and 40 is accepted, none of the listed options matches that pair. The trace identifies this mismatch but leaves the benchmark answer blank rather than resolving how the answer should map to the provided choices.

feedback: The trace is orderly and preserves the grounded end-of-third-quarter score pair, but it remains answer-incomplete: it lacks a grounded score-to-team mapping and does not justify any one of the provided options.
missing_information: Which team has 52 and which team has 40 at the end of the third quarter
Which provided answer choice is justified by the grounded end-of-third-quarter scoreboard reading
